raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left end-effector can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1; a gentle side contact point is available to prevent box_2 from moving because box_2 is attached_to box_1 and may be lifted or dragged during the pick.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is laterally constrained by the left end-effector, reducing relative motion between the stacked/attached boxes during the grasp of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both end-effectors have unobstructed access to the left and right sides of box_1; adequate clearance exists to apply opposing lateral forces. Claw grasp is not used because the box exceeds the 10 cm claw-size limit.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by both end-effectors via opposing side contacts and is ready to be lifted from box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is firmly supported by the right end-effector (and/or maintained by dual-arm contact) so the left end-effector can safely release box_2 without causing the stack to shift.",
    "Postcondition": "The left end-effector is no longer constraining box_2, and box_1 remains controlled by the robot."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is free and not interfering; both end-effectors maintain stable opposing lateral contact on box_1 with enough friction/force to lift without slipping.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is lifted and held securely off the tabletop/box_2 by the robot (picked up)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The left end-effector can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1; a gentle side contact point is available to prevent box_2 from moving because box_2 is attached_to box_1 and may be lifted or dragged during the pick.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is laterally constrained by the left end-effector, reducing relative motion between the stacked/attached boxes during the grasp of box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both end-effectors have unobstructed access to the left and right sides of box_1; adequate clearance exists to apply opposing lateral forces. Claw grasp is not used because the box exceeds the 10 cm claw-size limit.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by both end-effectors via opposing side contacts and is ready to be lifted from box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is firmly supported by the right end-effector (and/or maintained by dual-arm contact) so the left end-effector can safely release box_2 without causing the stack to shift.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The left end-effector is no longer constraining box_2, and box_1 remains controlled by the robot.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is free and not interfering; both end-effectors maintain stable opposing lateral contact on box_1 with enough friction/force to lift without slipping.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is lifted and held securely off the tabletop/box_2 by the robot (picked up).
